values: Trekkers who are slow may struggle to keep up with the team pace
Cross-training workouts are not accepted as valid fitness proof
Fitness records may be rejected if the fitness profile is not linked or if the required fitness level is not met at least three times in the past month

evidence.quote_or_summary: You struggle to be a part of the team because you’re slow.
We accept only running, jogging or walking as fitness proofs. Cross-training workouts will not be considered valid.
If you fail to link your fitness profile; If you do not meet the required fitness level at least three times in the past month

values: Walk, jog, or run 5 km in under 32 minutes (minimum recommended fitness level)

evidence.quote_or_summary: To do the Gurez Valley Trek comfortably, you must be able to walk, jog or run 5 km in under 32 minutes. This is the minimum recommended fitness level that you must aim for.

values: Fitness approval from the Indiahikes team is required 20 days before the trek date; without it, trekkers will not be allowed on the trek
At least 3 runs from the last 1 month must meet the trek's fitness criteria
Only running, jogging, or walking are accepted as fitness proofs; cross-training is not valid
Fitness profile link (e.g., Strava, Nike Run Club) must be pasted on the Indiahikes account and the profile must be public

evidence.quote_or_summary: Every trekker needs fitness approval from the Indiahikes team 20 days before the trek date. Without this, you will not be allowed on the trek.
Ensure that at least 3 runs from the last 1 month meet the fitness criteria of your specific trek.
We accept only running, jogging or walking as fitness proofs. Cross-training workouts will not be considered valid.
Paste your profile's link on your Indiahikes account (your profile has to be public).

values: 6 to 8 weeks before the trek begins
A 6-week fitness plan is provided for those not currently active

evidence.quote_or_summary: All you need to do is start following the fitness routine 6 to 8 weeks before your trek begins.
If you are not currently active, follow the below schedule to get trek fit in 6 weeks!

values: Children below 14 years are not required to submit fitness records; however, parents must ensure that children remain physically active and prepared for the trek

evidence.quote_or_summary: Children below 14 years are not required to submit fitness records. However, parents must ensure that children remain physically active and prepared for the trek.
